caption:
"We can't afford it right now."

Fair. But compare the system to the right number, not to zero.

Slow follow-up already has a cost. Most service businesses take hours to answer a new lead, and the ones who respond within minutes close far more of them. That gap runs every day, fixed or not.

That's why Black Arrow never quotes a price before looking at your pipeline. Your lead volume, ad spend, and gaps aren't the same as the business down the street. A number without a diagnosis is a guess.

One meeting changes that. Black Arrow reviews your numbers, shows you where revenue leaks, and scopes the fix around what you need. Every request gets a response within one business day.

DM SCALE

#ServiceBusiness #LeadFollowUp #SpeedToLead #HomeServiceMarketing #GrowthInfrastructure
rationale: Objection Handling is under-served this cycle, and the cost objection has never been tackled honestly on this account; carousels currently win saves/depth for B2B objection content, and this gives owners a real reframe (compare to the cost of slow follow-up, not zero) instead of dodging the pricing question.
